title: rubus × sertiflorus
intro: Rubus × sertiflorus, also known as the raspberry rose or multiflora raspberry, is a hybrid plant species between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × sertiflorus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Rubus × sertiflorus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
